scenario: A foreign student living at a Swedish contact address applies for a coordination number to open a Swedish bank account. Uses the Swedish contact address block (streetAddressSweden/postalCodeSweden/cityNameSweden); the foreign contact address block is left entirely absent, consistent with the form's own 'specified only if a Swedish contact address is missing' instruction.

fields.connectionDescription: I am enrolled as a full-time exchange student at Uppsala University for the 2026/2027 academic year.
fields.coordinationNumberReason: I need a coordination number to open a Swedish bank account to receive my student stipend payments.
